name: Liberty Holdings Limited
summary: Liberty Holdings Limited, a financial services company, engages in the insurance business in South Africa. The company offers critical illness, disability, income and life protection, car, home, personal liability, medical, and salary protection insurance products, as well as funeral cover; and annuities, group risk, umbrella fund solutions, investment products, asset management, and consulting and actuarial services. It serves individuals, corporates, and retirement funds. The company was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Johannesburg, South Africa. Liberty Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Standard Bank Group Limited.
